all.en: Attention all employees: an important policy revision takes effect July first.
all.zh: 全體員工請注意：一項重要政策修訂將於七月一日起生效。

all.en: The Bring Your Own Device program has been thoroughly redesigned this quarter.
all.zh: 本季已全面重新設計「自帶設備」計畫。

all.en: These changes balance employee flexibility with stronger corporate data protection.
all.zh: 此次變更兼顧員工彈性與更強的企業資料保護。

all.en: Please read this announcement carefully and take action before the deadline.
all.zh: 請仔細閱讀此公告，並於截止日前採取行動。

all.en: BYOD allows you to access work resources from personal phones or tablets.
all.zh: BYOD 讓您能從個人手機或平板存取工作資源。

all.en: Approximately seventy percent of our workforce currently participates in the program.
all.zh: 目前約百分之七十的員工參與此計畫。

all.en: Popular use cases include checking email and joining quick video calls.
all.zh: 熱門使用情境包括收發電子郵件及加入快速視訊通話。

all.en: Independent audits this spring revealed several concerning security gaps.
all.zh: 今春的獨立稽核揭露了多項令人擔憂的安全漏洞。

all.en: Personal devices often lack screen locks, encryption, or current operating systems.
all.zh: 個人裝置經常缺乏螢幕鎖、加密或最新作業系統。

all.en: These weaknesses expose company data to theft if devices are lost.
all.zh: 這些弱點使公司資料在裝置遺失時暴露於遭竊風險。

all.en: Regulatory expectations have also tightened, particularly in Europe and California.
all.zh: 法規期望亦已趨嚴，尤其是歐洲及加州地區。

all.en: To address these issues, we are mandating mobile device management enrollment.
all.zh: 為解決這些問題，我們將強制要求註冊行動裝置管理。

all.en: Our chosen MDM platform is Microsoft Intune for cross-platform compatibility.
all.zh: 我們選擇的 MDM 平台為 Microsoft Intune，以提供跨平台相容性。

all.en: Intune supports iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS devices seamlessly.
all.zh: Intune 可無縫支援 iOS、Android、Windows 及 macOS 裝置。

all.en: All BYOD participants must install Intune by Monday, June thirtieth.
all.zh: 所有 BYOD 參與者必須於六月三十日週一前安裝 Intune。

all.en: After this date, unenrolled devices lose access to corporate applications.
all.zh: 此日期後，未註冊裝置將無法存取公司應用程式。

all.en: This includes Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, and the internal HR portal.
all.zh: 包含 Outlook、Teams、SharePoint 及內部人資入口。

all.en: VPN connections from personal devices will also be blocked automatically.
all.zh: 個人裝置的 VPN 連線同樣將被自動封鎖。

all.en: Enrollment is straightforward and typically takes under fifteen minutes.
all.zh: 註冊程序簡單明瞭，通常耗時不到十五分鐘。

all.en: Download the Intune Company Portal app from your device's official store.
all.zh: 請從您裝置的官方商店下載 Intune 公司入口應用程式。

all.en: Sign in using your standard corporate email and password credentials.
all.zh: 請使用您一般的公司電子郵件及密碼登入。

all.en: Follow the on-screen prompts to register the device with our tenant.
all.zh: 請依照螢幕指示將裝置註冊至我們的租戶。

all.en: The system will install required certificates and security profiles.
all.zh: 系統將安裝必要的憑證及安全設定檔。

all.en: A complete reboot is recommended once enrollment finishes successfully.
all.zh: 註冊成功完成後建議完整重新開機一次。

all.en: We understand some employees have concerns about personal privacy implications.
all.zh: 我們了解部分員工對個人隱私影響有所疑慮。

all.en: Let me clearly outline what the company can and cannot see.
all.zh: 讓我清楚說明公司可以與不可以看到的範圍。

all.en: IT can view device model, operating system version, and compliance status.
all.zh: IT 可檢視裝置型號、作業系統版本及合規狀態。

all.en: We can also see which corporate apps are installed and their versions.
all.zh: 我們也可看到已安裝的公司應用程式及其版本。

all.en: IT cannot read personal text messages, photos, or browsing history.
all.zh: IT 無法讀取個人簡訊、照片或瀏覽紀錄。

all.en: Personal applications such as banking or social media remain entirely private.
all.zh: 銀行或社群媒體等個人應用程式仍完全私密。

all.en: Location data is not tracked unless you actively use a corporate app.
all.zh: 除非您主動使用公司應用程式，否則不會追蹤位置資料。

all.en: Personal files stored outside work containers cannot be accessed by us.
all.zh: 存放於工作容器外的個人檔案我們無法存取。

all.en: If you leave the company, only corporate data is wiped remotely.
all.zh: 若您離開公司，僅會遠端清除公司資料。

all.en: Your photos, contacts, and personal apps remain completely untouched.
all.zh: 您的照片、聯絡人及個人應用程式將完全保留不受影響。

all.en: This selective wipe is called container-based separation in industry terms.
all.zh: 此選擇性清除在業界術語中稱為「容器式分離」。

all.en: We have published the full privacy data sheet on the policy intranet page.
all.zh: 我們已於政策內部網頁發布完整的隱私資料表。

all.en: Please review it before raising concerns through the feedback channel.
all.zh: 請於透過回饋管道提出疑慮前先行檢閱。

all.en: Employees who prefer not to enroll have an alternative option available.
all.zh: 不願註冊的員工可選擇替代方案。

all.en: You may request a company-issued device for work use only.
all.zh: 您可申請公司配發的裝置，僅供工作使用。

all.en: Standard issue includes an entry-level smartphone with unlimited data plan.
all.zh: 標準配發包含一支入門智慧手機及無上限數據方案。

all.en: Submit the request form through the IT portal under Hardware Requests.
all.zh: 請透過 IT 入口「硬體申請」頁面提交申請表。

all.en: Approval typically takes five business days, and shipping adds another week.
all.zh: 核准通常需五個工作日，配送另需一週。

all.en: Plan accordingly to avoid any service interruption around the deadline.
all.zh: 請妥善規劃以避免於截止日附近發生服務中斷。

all.en: Compliance monitoring will begin the day after the policy takes effect.
all.zh: 合規監控將於政策生效次日開始。

all.en: Noncompliant devices receive an automated email warning every twenty-four hours.
all.zh: 不合規裝置每二十四小時收到一次自動警示郵件。

all.en: After three warnings, access is suspended pending manager confirmation.
all.zh: 三次警示後將暫停存取，並等候主管確認。

all.en: Repeated noncompliance may impact performance review documentation.
all.zh: 屢次不合規可能影響績效考核紀錄。

all.en: We hope it never reaches that stage with cooperative early enrollment.
all.zh: 我們希望透過儘早合作註冊，永遠不會走到那一步。

all.en: Help desk resources have been expanded to support this transition smoothly.
all.zh: 服務台資源已擴編以順利支援此次轉換。

all.en: Walk-in clinics will operate in every regional office through July fifteenth.
all.zh: 至七月十五日前，各區辦公室皆設有臨櫃諮詢據點。

all.en: Bring your device during lunch hour for hands-on enrollment assistance.
all.zh: 請於午休時間攜帶裝置前來，獲取實機註冊協助。

all.en: Remote employees can schedule virtual screen-sharing appointments instead.
all.zh: 遠端員工可改預約虛擬螢幕分享會議。

all.en: Thank you for partnering with us to strengthen mobile security maturity.
all.zh: 感謝您與我們攜手強化行動安全成熟度。

all.en: Together, we keep both customer trust and personal flexibility intact.
all.zh: 齊心協力，我們可同時維護客戶信任與個人彈性。

all.en: Please reach out with any questions through the dedicated BYOD inbox.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問，請透過 BYOD 專屬信箱聯繫我們。
